title: Printing qcthat objects — printing
text: One main purposes qcthat produce user-friendly reports package's issue test statuses. Printing issue-test matrix provides nested view relationship milestones, issues, tests, well state issues ("open", "closed (completed)", "closed (fix)") disposition tests ("passed", "failed", "skipped").

Included associated issue checklist. chrKeywords (character) Keywords search just issue numbers commit messages. Defaults GitHub issue-linking keywords chrLabels (character) name(s) labels(s) use. chrMilestones (character) name(s) milestone(s) filter issues . chrSourcePath (character) Components path source file. file extension included filename omitted (sent separate piece vector). chrTargetPath (character) Components path target file. file extension included filename omitted (sent separate piece vector). chrTests (character) vector test descriptions CompileIssueTestMatrix() matrix. dttmTimestamp (POSIXct) system timestamp. dfITM (qcthat_IssueTestMatrix) qcthat_IssueTestMatrix object returned AsIssueTestMatrix(). dfRepoIssues (qcthat_Issues data frame) Data frame GitHub issues returned FetchRepoIssues(). dfTestResults (qcthat_TestResults data frame) Data frame test results returned CompileTestResults(). envCall (environment) environment use error reporting. Typically set rlang::caller_env(). envErrorMessage (environment) environment pass glue::glue() resolve variables. fctDisposition (factor) Disposition factor levels c("fail", "skip", "pass"). intIssue (length-1 integer) issue check associated. intIssues (integer) vector issue numbers CompileIssueTestMatrix() matrix GitHub. intMaxCommits (length-1 integer) maximum number commits return git logs. Leaving default almost always fine, can reduce number repository long commit history function slow. intPageMax (length-1 integer) maximum number pages commits fetch GitHub API. page contains 100 commits. Defaults 100, fetches 10,000 commits. likely never need increase number, try larger number merge involves large number commits large repository. intParentIssue (length-1 integer) number parent issue parent-child issue relationship. intPRNumber (length-1 integer) number pull request fetch information . intPRNumbers (integer) vector pull request numbers. intUATIssue (integer) number issue tracks user-acceptance testing. lCommentsRaw (list) List raw comment objects returned gh::gh(). lIssuesNonPR (list) List issue objects returned RemovePRsFromIssues(). lTestResults (testthat_results) testthat test results object, typically obtained running something like testthat::test_local() stop_on_failure = FALSE reporter cause issues parallel testing, like reporter = "silent", assigning name. lPRActionRuns (list) list workflow run objects returned GitHub. lglReportFailure (length-1 logical) Whether ignore failures (default unless "qcthat_UAT" environment variable "true"), fail (show failure testthat tests). lglOverwrite (length-1 logical) Whether overwrite files already exist. lglShowMilestones (length-1 logical) Whether separate issues milestones reports. lglShowIgnoredLabels (length-1 logical) Whether show information reports issue labels ("qcthat-nocov") ignored. lglUpdate (length-1 logical) Whether update existing comment already exists (rather creating new comment). lglUseEmoji (length-1 logical) Whether use emojis (TRUE emoji package installed) ASCII indicators (FALSE) output. default, determined qcthat.emoji option, defaults TRUE. lglWarn (length-1 logical) Whether warn extra value included filter (report still returns results). Defaults TRUE. objShape (0-row data.frame, etc) Object expected structure. strBody (length-1 character) body issue, PR, comment, GitHub markdown. strBodyCompiled (length-1 character) full body issue, PR, comment, GitHub markdown, including components title hidden qcthat-comment-id. strChildIssueID (length-1 character) id field issue connect parent issue. strCommentID (length-1 character) unique ID comment within given context, usually hash title comment. strCommitSHA (length-1 character) commit SHA target. strConditionSubclass (length-1 character) subclass condition. strConditionClass (length-1 character) One "error", "warning", "message". strDescription (length-1 character) brief description user expectation. strDisposition (length-1 character) result test, "pass", "fail", "skip", "accepted" "pending" UAT. strErrorSubclass (length-1 character) subclass error condition. strExtension (length-1 character) file extension use target file. target path already includes extension, replaced value. value already correct, effect. strGHToken (length-1 character) GitHub token permissions read issues. strOwner (length-1 character) GitHub username organization name. strPkgRoot (length-1 character) path directory package. expanded using gert::git_find(). strPRHeadRef (length-1 character) branch name (head ref) PR. strRepo (length-1 character) GitHub repository name. strReportType (length-1 character) main title report, "Completed Issues" "PR-Associated Issues". strRunID (length-1 character) ID (typically numeric can long) GitHub Actions workflow run. strSourceRef (length-1 character) Name git reference contains changes. Defaults active branch repository. strState (length-1 character) State issues pull requests fetch. Must one "open", "closed", "". Defaults "open" pull requests "" issues. strTargetRef (length-1 character) Name git reference merged . Defaults default branch repository. strTitle (length-1 character) title issue.

title: qcthat 1.0.0
text: can now use package implement QC framework R package associated GitHub repository.

title: qcthat 1.0.0
text: series QC*() functions generate QC reports different sets issues: QCPackage() issues tests R package associated GitHub repository (#46, #69). QCCompletedIssues() issues closed completed (#69, #80). QCIssues() specific issues (#86), QCMilestones() issues associated specific named milestones (#68, #88) QCPR() issues associated specific GitHub pull requests, QCMergeGH() generalize issues associated GitHub merge using GitHub’s graph determine connections, QCMergeLocal() detect probable associations based commit messages (#68, #84). series Action_*() functions set GitHub actions QC reports: Action_QCCompletedIssues() run QCCompletedIssues() (#69, #73). Action_QCPRIssues() run QCPR() specific pull requests (#55, #68). Action_QCMilestone() run QCMilestones() pull requests associated milestones, releases names match milestones (#68, #88).

Function CompileTestResults() extract test results testthat test runs compile user-friendly data frame (#32). Function CompileIssueTestMatrix() link GitHub issues test results, producing IssueTestMatrix object summarizes state issues associated tests (#35, #49). Custom print methods qcthat_SingleIssueTestResults, qcthat_Milestone, qcthat_IssueTestMatrix objects display contents user-friendly tree format (#31, #36, #45, #60, #61).
